creator: p5B2EA84B3@t-online.de
text:
(In reply to Andrew "RhodiumToad" Gierth from comment #1)

# tree /etc/ssl
/etc/ssl
├── cert.pem -> ../../usr/local/share/certs/ca-root-nss.crt
├── certs -> /usr/local/share/certs/
└── openssl.cnf

# tree /usr/local/share/certs/
/usr/local/share/certs/
└── ca-root-nss.crt

For output of pkg -d update -f see attachment
